departments.label: Surveillance
departments.instructions: Track cases, test positivity, and spread signals. Escalate alerts quickly when clusters appear or mobility rises.

departments.label: Hospital Surge
departments.instructions: Manage ICU load, staffing, beds, and referrals. Trigger surge plans before occupancy crosses critical thresholds.

departments.label: Schools
departments.instructions: Balance transmission control with continuity. Recommend closures or hybrid measures when child-to-household spread risk grows.

departments.label: Mobility and Travel
departments.instructions: Advise on movement restrictions, screening, and border measures. Weigh enforcement costs against delayed transmission.

departments.label: Vaccine and Supplies
departments.instructions: Procure vaccines, PPE, tests, and therapeutics. Prioritize lead times, stockouts, and rollout readiness.

departments.label: Economic Relief
departments.instructions: Design support for workers and businesses affected by restrictions. Keep aid timely enough to preserve compliance.

theme: A regional governor responds day by day to a novel respiratory outbreak, balancing containment, hospital strain, civil liberties, and political support.
